name: project-arch-extension
description: Workspace scaffold for the Project Arch VS Code extension app

commands.title: Project Arch: View Local Workflow Status
Project Arch: Send Command to Existing Terminal
Project Arch: Send Command to New Terminal
Project Arch: Remove project-arch from Repository
Project Arch: Return to Workflow View

scripts.build: pnpm run build:host && pnpm run build:webview:experimental
scripts.verify:shared-shell-layer: pnpm run build:webview:experimental && pnpm run typecheck:experimental-webview && pnpm run test:shared-shell-layer && pnpm run validate:shared-shell-layer --with-build-output
scripts.verify:artifact-browser-shell-compositio: pnpm run build:host && pnpm run typecheck:experimental-webview && pnpm run test:artifact-browser-shell-composition && pnpm run build:webview:experimental && pnpm run validate:artifact-browser-shell-composition --with-build-output
scripts.verify:artifact-browser-shell-parity: pnpm run build:host && pnpm run typecheck:experimental-webview && pnpm run test:artifact-browser-shell-parity && pnpm run build:webview:experimental && pnpm run validate:artifact-browser-shell-parity --with-build-output
scripts.verify:artifact-browser-migration-safety: pnpm run build:host && pnpm run typecheck:experimental-webview && pnpm run test:artifact-browser-shell-composition && pnpm run test:artifact-browser-shell-parity && pnpm run test:shell-surface-consolidation && pnpm run test:artifact-browser-migration-safety && pnpm run build:webview:experimental && pnpm run validate:artifact-browser-shell-composition --with-build-output && pnpm run validate:artifact-browser-shell-parity --with-build-output && pnpm run validate:shell-surface-consolidation --with-build-output && pnpm run validate:artifact-browser-migration-safety --with-build-output
scripts.verify:runs-runtimes-shell-composition: pnpm run build:host && pnpm run typecheck:experimental-webview && pnpm run test:runs-runtimes-shell-composition && pnpm run validate:runs-runtimes-shell-composition
scripts.verify:lifecycle-command-shell-compositi: pnpm run build:host && pnpm run typecheck:experimental-webview && pnpm run test:lifecycle-command-shell-composition && pnpm run validate:lifecycle-command-shell-composition
scripts.verify:shared-navigation-guidance-integr: pnpm run build:host && pnpm run typecheck:experimental-webview && pnpm run test:shared-navigation-guidance-integration && pnpm run build:webview:experimental && pnpm run validate:shared-navigation-guidance-integration --with-build-output
scripts.verify:multi-surface-coexistence-regress: pnpm run build:host && pnpm run typecheck:experimental-webview && pnpm run test:runs-runtimes-shell-composition && pnpm run test:lifecycle-command-shell-composition && pnpm run test:shared-navigation-guidance-integration && pnpm run test:multi-surface-coexistence-regression-safety && pnpm run build:webview:experimental && pnpm run validate:runs-runtimes-shell-composition && pnpm run validate:lifecycle-command-shell-composition && pnpm run validate:shared-navigation-guidance-integration --with-build-output && pnpm run validate:shell-surface-consolidation --with-build-output && pnpm run validate:artifact-browser-migration-safety --with-build-output && pnpm run validate:multi-surface-coexistence-regression-safety --with-build-output
scripts.verify:shell-surface-consolidation: pnpm run build:host && pnpm run typecheck:experimental-webview && pnpm run test:shell-surface-consolidation && pnpm run build:webview:experimental && pnpm run validate:shell-surface-consolidation --with-build-output
scripts.verify: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run typecheck:experimental-webview && pnpm run lint && pnpm run test
scripts.package:vsix: pnpm run build && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('.artifacts',{recursive:true})" && vsce package --no-dependencies --out .artifacts/project-arch-extension.vsix
